title: Persona-attribution result record
description: One line of results.jsonl. You produce these; the owner ingests them. This is THE contract — conformance.py enforces it on both sides.

global_idx.description: MUST equal the input task's global_idx (this is how the owner joins your output back).

model.description: Optional provenance: which model produced this (e.g. claude-opus-4-8).

fields.description: One entry per persona dimension you attempted. Unattempted dimensions may be omitted; unsupported ones use value null.

field_id.description: Must be an id from the dimensions spec the owner shipped.

value.description: Must be one of that dimension's allowed values (verbatim), or null when unsupported.

evidence.description: Short quote copied from profile_text. Required (non-empty) whenever value is not null.
